gwSpecs.description: COLORado 1 Solo builds on the pedigree of our COLORado line of fixtures with new all-environment performance and advanced optics. This powerful RGBW LED wash projects an even, fully homogenized beam through fast and smooth zooming optics. Utilizing new IP rated power and data connectors and full convection cooling allows this fixture to perform anywhere from a silent main stage theater to an outdoor summer music festival.
